basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Principal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Principal Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Preferably below 50 years as on the closing date of application. Relaxation in age and experience may be considered for exceptional candidates.

qualification.details: Master's Degree from a recognised University/Institution with B.Ed. Minimum 10 years of teaching experience in a reputed CBSE-affiliated school. At least 5 years of experience in a leadership role such as Vice-Principal, Principal, Senior Academic Coordinator, or equivalent. Experience in handling CBSE Board Examinations, affiliation processes, academic planning, and regulatory compliance. Demonstrated record of academic leadership, teaching-learning material development, school administration, and institutional growth. Desirable: Ph.D. and/or advanced qualifications in Education or related disciplines. Familiarity with implementation of NEP-2020 and NCF-2023. Strong understanding of contemporary pedagogical practices, experiential learning, and competency-based education. Proficiency in educational technology, digital learning platforms, and school ERP systems. Excellent communication skills in English and Hindi. Proven ability to build collaborative, inclusive, and learner-centric school culture. Exposure to STEM-focused educational environments and innovation-driven schooling. Ability to engage constructively with parents, faculty, and institutional stakeholders.

salary_details.details: Indicative Salary: Rs. 65000 Campus accommodation and other institutional facilities may be considered subject to availability and applicable rules.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Mandi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Mandi Principal Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi Principal recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Principal post at IIT Mandi is 15th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Principal position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree from a recognized university along with a B.Ed. Additionally, a minimum of 10 years of teaching experience in a CBSE-affiliated school and 5 years in a leadership role are mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The preferred age limit for the Principal position is below 50 years as of the application closing date. However, age relaxation may be considered for exceptionally qualified candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Principal role?
faq.answer: The indicative salary for the Principal position is Rs. 65,000 per month. Campus accommodation and other institutional facilities might also be provided based on availability and rules.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Mandi Principal job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the provided Google Forms link. Ensure all details are accurate and upload necessary documents before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be conducted in person on 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to be prepared for this date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates can proceed with their application without fee payment.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is required for the Principal post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 10 years of teaching experience in a reputed CBSE-affiliated school is required, along with at least 5 years of experience in a leadership capacity like Vice-Principal or Senior Academic Coordinator.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any desirable qualifications for the Principal position?
faq.answer: Yes, a Ph.D. or advanced qualifications in Education, familiarity with NEP-2020, strong understanding of modern pedagogy, and proficiency in educational technology are considered desirable.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
